name: Defiance
additional_info: The Effectiveness of Defiance will be lessened if you do not meet its Willpower requirement. Works on: Burn damage, the duration of Chill, Winded, Suffocation, time knocked, Ring of Pestilence, and Sightless Still, Crystal and Surge Rod gain, Blood Poisoning gain and Wither gain.
desc: Negative status effects are half as effective when you are below 35% HP.
